channel.title: Linux on Mehr Ali
channel.description: Recent content in Linux on Mehr Ali

item.title: Untethered Control: How I Engineered a Secure SSH Tunnel Between My Laptops
item.author: sheikhmehrali5@gmail.com (Mehr Ali)
item.description: What happens when you combine the mindset of an engineer with the vision of an artist? You start looking for ways to break physical boundaries and make your machines talk to each other.
